choose_language: Choose your language / اختر لغتك / Выберите язык
welcome:
🐿️ *Welcome to Sandy Squirrel!*

I can download videos and audio from YouTube, Instagram, *Threads*, Facebook, Twitter/X, Vimeo, Reddit, and more.

*How to use me:*
• Just paste a video URL and I'll download it for you
• Use /download or /audio followed by a URL
• Choose your preferred quality when prompted

*Commands:*
/start — Show this message
/help — Detailed instructions
/download `<url>` — Download video
/audio `<url>` — Download audio only
/quality — Supported quality options
/cancel — Cancel current download
/language — Change language

*Supported platforms:*
▶️ YouTube  📸 Instagram  🧵 Threads
👤 Facebook  🐦 Twitter/X
🎬 Vimeo  🔗 Reddit  📅 Dailymotion

Ready to download? Send me a link! 🚀
help:
📖 *Sandy Squirrel – Help Guide*

*Downloading a video:*
Simply paste a URL, or use:
`/download https://youtube.com/watch?v=...`

*Threads example:*
`/download https://www.threads.net/@user/post/ABC123`

*Downloading audio only:*
`/audio https://youtube.com/watch?v=...`

*Quality selection:*
After sending a URL you'll get quality options:
• 🥇 Best – Highest available quality
• 📺 720p – HD video
• 📱 480p – Standard definition
• 🔻 360p – Low bandwidth
• 🔍 144p – Minimum quality
• 🎵 Audio – MP3 audio only

*Limitations:*
• Max file size: 2 GB (files over 50 MB upload via Telethon)
• Private/age-restricted content is not supported
• Geo-blocked content may not be available

*Tips:*
• For large YouTube videos, try 360p or audio-only
• Instagram Reels, Stories, and Threads posts are supported
• Use /cancel if a download is taking too long

Need more help? Just send a URL and I'll handle the rest! 🐿️
quality_options:
🎚 *Available Quality Options*

• 🥇 *Best* – Highest available resolution + audio
• 📺 *720p* – HD (recommended for most use cases)
• 📱 *480p* – Standard definition
• 🔻 *360p* – Low bandwidth
• 🔍 *144p* – Minimum quality
• 🎵 *Audio* – MP3 audio only (no video)

Quality options appear automatically after you send a URL.
cancel_requested: 🛑 Cancellation requested. Your download will stop shortly.
no_active_download: ℹ️ No active download to cancel.
active_download_warning: ⚠️ You already have an active download. Use /cancel to stop it first.
upload_failed:
❌ Upload failed: {error}

The file may be too large or Telegram timed out.
invalid_url: ❌ Invalid URL. Please provide a valid video link.
link_detected:
🔗 *Link detected!*

`{url}`

Choose what you'd like to do:
expired_url: ❌ The URL for this request has expired or is invalid. Please send the link again.
conversion_unsupported: This file type is not supported for conversion yet.
conversion_expired: This conversion request expired. Please send the file again.
conversion_wrong_user: This conversion request belongs to another user.
conversion_too_large: This file is too large for conversion. Max allowed: {limit} MB.
conversion_error_too_large: This file is too large for conversion.
conversion_error_timeout: Conversion took too long and was stopped. Try a smaller file.
conversion_error_unsupported: This conversion is not supported yet.
conversion_error_missing_tool: The conversion tool is not available on this server.
conversion_error_failed: Conversion failed. Please try a different file.
active_conversion_warning: You already have an active conversion. Please wait for it to finish.
